popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: The Hastings coat of arms was one of the first created. Its romantic origin centers on an ancestor of Emma de Hastings -- Hugh de Hastings of Barawell. He received Barawell upon marriage to Erneburga …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Hastings於1098年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾巴爾維爾時，他的父親William de Hastings I36歲，母親Hawise fitz walter de windsor24歲。他於1129年與Erneburga Flamville在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿斯頓 福拉姆維爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1163年之前在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾費隆格利，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾費隆格利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Hastings于1098年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾巴爾維爾时，他的父亲William de Hastings I36岁，母亲Hawise fitz walter de windsor24岁。他于1129年与Erneburga Flamville在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾阿斯頓 福拉姆維爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1163年之前在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾費隆格利，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾費隆格利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Hastings was born in 1098, in Barwell, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Hastings I, was 36 and his mother, Hawise fitz walter de windsor, was 24. He married Erneburga Flamville in 1129, in Aston Flamville, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 1163, in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Hastings est né en 1098, à Barwell, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Hastings I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hawise fitz walter de windsor, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Erneburga Flamville en 1129, à Aston Flamville, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 1163, à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Fillongley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1129 in Aston Flamville, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Erneburga Flamville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1163 in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fillongley, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Hastingsが1098年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアバーウエルで生まれた時，父William de Hastings Iは36歳，母Hawise fitz walter de windsorは24歳であった。1129年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアストン フラムヴィルでErneburga Flamvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1163年以前にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーで死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Hastings(이)가 1098년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 바웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Hastings I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise fitz walter de windsor(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1129년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스턴 플램빌에서 Erneburga Flamville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1163년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 피론글리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 피론글리에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Erneburga Flamville em 1129, em Aston Flamville, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Hastings родился в 1098 г. в местности барвелл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Hastings I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise fitz walter de windsor, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Erneburga Flamville в 1129 г. в местности астон флэмвилл, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 1163 г. в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности филлонгли, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
